news.headline: BrightSpire Capital, Inc. sets record date for 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on March 24, to be held virtually on May 14, 2025 at 10 am ET.
news.summary: BrightSpire Capital, Inc. (NYSE: BRSP) has revealed that its Board of Directors has designated March 24, 2025, as the record date for the Company's upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. This virtual meeting is scheduled to take place on May 14, 2025, at 10:00 am Eastern Time. Details about accessing the virtual meeting will be provided in the Company’s 2025 proxy statement. BrightSpire Capital, Inc. (NYSE: BRSP) is the company in focus.

news.headline: US consumer prices increased by 0.2% in February, as per CPI report - updates ongoing.
U.S. inflation falls below expectations, providing slight relief for the economy.
New CFO announced by Omnicell, marking an important change for the company.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is expected to grow by 3.2% this year, with some regions experiencing higher growth rates than others. Asia is forecasted to have the fastest growth at 5.2%, while Europe is projected to grow by 2.1%. Additionally, it is estimated that the world GDP will reach $87.3 trillion by the end of the year. The report also indicates that inflation rates are expected to remain stable at around 2.3% globally. Experts believe that factors such as trade tensions and geopolitical issues may impact the economic growth in the coming months. The job market is predicted to see an increase, with approximately 45 million jobs expected to be created worldwide. This data suggests a positive outlook for the global economy in the near future.

news.headline: Causal Labs raises $6M seed funding for AI weather prediction. Plans to develop models and expand team.
news.summary: A company based in San Francisco, Causal Labs, is making headlines as it secures $6 million in seed funding. This funding round is led by Kindred Ventures and also involves contributions from Refactor, BoxGroup, Factorial, Otherwise, Karman Ventures, and several angel investors. Causal Labs specializes in AI technology focusing on physics-based models to tackle large-scale societal issues. With this funding, the company aims to grow its team, enhance its existing model with a focus on safety and transparency features, and kickstart new developments in its field.

news.headline: Sidus Space and Warpspace partner for Joint Venture in advanced optical space communication, NASDAQ: SIDU involved.
news.summary: In Cape Canaveral, Florida, and Azuma City, Japan, Sidus Space (NASDAQ: SIDU) revealed a partnership with Warpspace, a leading Japanese space technology firm. The Memorandum of Understanding sets the stage for a potential Joint Venture between the two companies. This collaboration aims to provide advanced services for satellite communication in real-time at high speeds. Sidus Space is known for its innovative approaches in space missions, while Warpspace specializes in high-speed communication networks. The partnership signifies a significant move towards integrated solutions for the next generation of satellite communication technologies.

news.headline: Data pros warn of potential crises due to lack of data quality in AI projects, as 96% fear repercussions. 81% report significant data issues.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, data integration, quality, analytics, and AI leader Qlik® published findings from a new survey of 500 U.S. professionals involved in AI. The study showed that AI projects face threats due to subpar data quality and unrealistic ROI forecasts. The survey highlighted that 81% of AI experts believe their firms grapple with noteworthy data quality problems, jeopardizing the effectiveness of AI investments. The report underlined the imperative for business leaders to prioritize data quality for successful AI integration.

news.headline: T. Rowe Price Group reports assets under management of $1.63 trillion as of February 28, 2025, with net outflows of $4.7B.
news.summary: In Baltimore on March 12, 2025, T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. disclosed that their assets under management stood at $1.63 trillion by the end of February 28, 2025. The company reported net outflows of $4.7 billion for February 2025. These figures were shared in their recent press release.

news.headline: FairNow partners with Nemko Digital and Zertia to strengthen AI governance for enterprises globally. (Word count: 15)
news.summary: A recent collaboration is boosting AI risk management, compliance, and trust-building globally. FairNow, Inc., a top AI governance platform, has partnered with Nemko Digital and Zertia. This move aims to assist organizations worldwide in improving their operations. The partnership, announced on March 12, 2025, is set to leverage the strengths of FairNow, Nemko Digital, and Zertia to provide comprehensive solutions. The collaboration has the potential to significantly impact enterprises, with key focuses on enhancing AI governance and building trust. The partnership showcases a strategic effort to address challenges in the industry and improve overall compliance. This initiative reflects the growing importance of effective risk management in the ever-evolving landscape of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: CSG Systems Intl. to discuss Q1 2025 earnings on May 7 at 5PM ET with CSG president and CFO. Call 1-888-412-4131, passcode 2327393 for info.
news.summary: CSG, a company listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol CSGS, will be holding a conference call on May 7, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss its first quarter financial performance. The call will include insights from CSG's president and CEO, Brian Shepherd, as well as its CFO, Hai Tran. To join the conference, dial 1-888-412-4131 and enter passcode 2327393. Alternatively, you can participate in the webcast of the earnings call in real-time or access the archive. CSG is a leading provider of solutions in the industry.

news.headline: SVB and Pinegrove Venture Partners partner to extend venture debt to tech and life science companies nationally.
news.summary: A strategic lending partnership between Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) and First Citizens Bank will now offer venture debt to technology and life science firms across the US. The collaboration aims to enhance access to financing for companies in these sectors. This initiative comes into effect on March 12, 2025, with SVB extending its lending reach to a broader national audience. The partnership is expected to bring substantial support and opportunities to technology and life science businesses looking to grow and expand.

news.headline: Redpoint Global named leader in Omdia Universe CDP Report for 2025, highest ranking for vendor execution.
news.summary: In Wellesley, Massachusetts, Redpoint Global has been recognized as a Leader in the Omdia Universe for Customer Data Platforms 2025 report. Omdia, a renowned technology research and analysis firm, awarded Redpoint CDP the top position for vendor execution and rated it in the highest tier across various categories such as technology features, solution breadth, and strategy & innovation. They recommend Redpoint to be included in the shortlist for those seeking a CDP vendor, emphasizing its strong performance.

news.headline: Bloomberg launches Ultrashort TIPS 1-13 Months Index; selected as benchmark for RBIL ETF.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in New York, Bloomberg unveiled the Bloomberg US Ultrashort TIPS 1-13 Months Index as the standard for the F/m Ultrashort Treasury Inflation-Protected Security ETF (RBIL). This move signifies a new milestone in the world of finance, providing a basis for tracking short-term Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities with a duration range of 1-13 months. The index's selection highlights its significance in the market, offering investors a valuable tool for assessing this specific sector.

news.headline: Eco-Growth Strategies, Inc. (OTC PINK: ECGS) to acquire Hawaiian Springs Water Company in Hilo, HI. Merger agreement executed.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Eco-Growth Strategies, Inc. (ticker symbol: ECGS), a prominent bottling company known for purified and spring water products, revealed its acquisition of Hawaiian Springs Water Company (HSW). The agreement involves obtaining all assets of HSW, including the plant located in Honolulu.

news.headline: Ace Endico partners with iFoodDS for food traceability, aiding FSMA 204 compliance. Leading to increased accountability.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on March 12, 2025, Ace Endico, a top specialty foods distributor in the New York Metropolitan Area and New England, disclosed its collaboration with iFoodDS, the primary provider of food traceability software. This partnership will empower Ace Endico to enhance its operations by leveraging cutting-edge technology solutions.

news.headline: Cryoport introduces High-Efficiency 800 C to support fertility clinics, biorepositories, labs. (Number: 800 C)
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on March 12, 2025, Cryoport, Inc. (NASDAQ: CYRX), a prominent provider of supply chain services for the life sciences sector, unveiled the High-Efficiency 800 C by MVE Biological Solutions. This product marks the newest offering in their range.

news.headline: Truist bolsters middle market banking team in New Jersey; hired Gino Di Saverio and 3 more recent additions.
news.summary: In Trenton, New Jersey on March 12, 2025, financial institution Truist revealed the addition of experienced commercial banking executive Gino Di Saverio to spearhead a expanding middle market banking team based in New Jersey, which now comprises a total of three new members. Di Saverio is known for his success in developing new business opportunities and maintaining a strong presence in the market.

news.headline: Immersion Corp reports Q3 fiscal 2025 revenue of $474.8M compared to $9.5M in Q3 fiscal 2023. Business Wire.
news.summary: In Aventura, Florida, Immersion Corporation, a prominent haptics technology provider, has released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025. During this period, the company reported total revenues of $474.8 million for the three months ending on January 31, 2025, marking a significant increase from the $9.5 million recorded in the three months ending on September 30, 2023. The company trades on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol IMMR.

news.headline: Edward Jones launching private client service for high net worth clients w/ new products and services on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: A financial services company based in St. Louis is set to introduce Edward Jones Generations™, a specialized private client services offering tailored for high net worth individuals. This new initiative, launching on March 12, 2025, will bring forth a range of exclusive products and services aimed at catering to the unique needs of affluent clients. This marks an important milestone for Edward Jones as they diversify their offerings to better serve this select clientele segment.

news.headline: Mobile Infrastructure Corp (NYSE: BEEP) to present at Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 19, 2025 at 3:15 pm ET. Stephanie Hogue, President, to lead.
news.summary: Mobile Infrastructure Corporation (NYSE American: BEEP) has revealed that Stephanie Hogue, President of the company, will be participating in the Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 19-20, 2025. The conference will see her presenting at 3:15pm ET on Wednesday, March 19, alongside holding one-on-one investor meetings. Mobile Infrastructure Corporation owns a varied collection of parking assets across the United States. This move is aimed at engaging with investors and showcasing the potential of the company.

news.headline: Minimal impact expected on health and wellness sector from Trump tariffs on imports; TruLife Distribution CEO optimistic.
news.summary: CEO of TruLife Distribution discusses the anticipated limited impact of the Trump administration's tariffs on supplements and related imports. This statement was made in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on March 12, 2025. As President Trump's policies unfolded, one significant development was...

news.headline: Oakland Dental Care welcomes Dr. James P. Sara, an expert in dental care, to their team on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In March 12, 2025, Oakland Dental Care shared the news of Dr. James P. Sara joining their practice with great enthusiasm. Dr. Sara's arrival brings a significant boost to the team with his extensive expertise and dedication to providing top-notch dental care. This addition reinforces Oakland Dental Care's commitment to delivering high-quality services to their patients.

news.headline: NUBURU (NYSE: BURU) acquires first step in defense sector expansion, focusing on innovative blue laser tech and AI solutions.
news.summary: NUBURU, Inc., based in Centennial, Colorado, and listed on NYSE American as BURU, specializing in high-power and high-brightness industrial blue laser tech, has achieved a significant milestone in their acquisition strategy by finalizing the initial phase focusing on defense and security sectors. This strategic decision underscores the company's dedication to integrating its laser technology know-how with innovative AI-based solutions and robotics.

news.headline: 60 rural small business owners from 16 states advocate for policy solutions in Washington for economic growth. #SmallBusiness #EconomicGrowth #Washington
news.summary: In Washington, Goldman Sachs 10,000 Small Businesses Voices organized a gathering of 60 small business owners from rural areas to advocate for support from Congress in overcoming challenges to growth. These entrepreneurs, representing 16 states, emphasized the need for assistance in America's heartland. Small Business Administration (SBA) Administrator Kelly Loeffler, along with policymakers and lawmakers, joined the event to listen to the concerns of rural small business owners.

news.headline: US Supercore CPI YoY: 3.780%, Previous 4.020%
Iran foreign ministry spokesperson: UAE's Gargash will deliver Trump's letter to Tehran - State Media.
US Supercore CPI MoM: 0.760%, Previous 0.2%.
Compensation for security-cleared professionals reaches all-time high at $119,131 despite workforce challenges.
news.summary: In Centennial, Colorado, DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) revealed that ClearanceJobs, a prominent online platform for security-cleared individuals in defense and intelligence fields, has published its 2025 Security Clearance Compensation Report. Despite economic fluctuations and changes in federal employment trends, salaries for cleared professionals increased by almost 4% in 2025, hitting a record $119,131. The need for skilled individuals with security clearances continues to be robust, with a significant rise in compensation.

news.headline: Flux Power's Q1 and Q2 2025 results call set on March 20, 2025, 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time - VISTA, Calif. via BUSINESS WIRE.
news.summary: Flux Power, based in Vista, California, will be holding a conference call to discuss their fiscal first and second quarter results for 2025. The call is scheduled for Thursday, March 20, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. This event is expected to provide insights into the company's performance during the initial six months of the fiscal year 2025.

news.headline: Bloomreach uses AI to enhance customer experience for ThirdLove, aiming to revolutionize personalization.
news.summary: A company based in Mountain View, California, Bloomreach, has been chosen to enhance personalization throughout the customer journey for ThirdLove.

news.headline: Rumble Announces Purchases of $17.1 Million in Bitcoin in Accordance with Previously Announced Bitcoin Treasury Strategy
news.summary: In Longboat Key, Florida on March 12, 2025, Rumble disclosed that it has acquired around 188 Bitcoins for its treasury at an average cost of roughly $91,000 per coin. This aligns with Rumble's Bitcoin treasury plan to dedicate up to $20 million to Bitcoin. The decision underscores Rumble's confidence in Bitcoin's utility for strategic purposes and bolsters its venture into the cryptocurrency domain.

news.headline: Verizon Business introduces Trusted Connection cybersecurity launch for end-to-end security.
news.summary: Verizon Business has introduced a groundbreaking network-native security solution for businesses. This innovative approach offers an end-to-end security solution that can be integrated directly into customer networks. This initiative marks a significant advancement in network security, providing a comprehensive and seamless security solution that can be seamlessly embedded within customer networks.

news.headline: Palisade Bio's PALI-2108 ranked in top 10% at DDW 2025 as Colon-Specific PDE4 Inhibitor Prodrug.
news.summary: The Abstract for PALI-2108, a prodrug of a Colon-Specific PDE4 Inhibitor, has been ranked in the top 10% of all abstracts selected for poster presentation at DDW. This achievement highlights the significance of this research among a large pool of submissions at the conference.PALI-2108 is a promising development in the field of colon-specific pharmaceuticals and its recognition at DDW signifies its potential impact on the market.

news.headline: Miata Metals starts 10,000m diamond drill program at Sela Creek Gold Project in Suriname.
news.summary: Miata Metals Corp. (CSE: MMET) (FSE: 8NQ) has started a 10,000-meter diamond core drilling program at the Sela Creek Gold Project in Suriname. The program began on March 12, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia.

news.headline: Reed's to conduct Q4 and full-year 2024 conference call on March 26 at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss financial results.
news.summary: Reed’s, Inc. will be conducting a conference call on March 26, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EST to review its financial performance for the three and twelve months ending December 31, 2024. The company, recognized for its range of artisanal, all-natural ginger drinks, is listed as OTCQX: REED. The discussion of results will be based on a press release issued before the call. This event will take place in Norwalk, Conn.

news.headline: Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. converts $19.5M debt to equity, strengthening balance sheet. CK Life Sciences exchanges debt for equity, removing all debt.
news.summary: The primary stakeholder, CK Life Sciences International (Holdings) Inc., has approved the conversion of debt into equity, resulting in the complete elimination of all current debt from Dogwood's financial records. This strategic move by the largest shareholder effectively improves the balance sheet by removing the existing debt burden, enhancing the financial health and stability of the company.

news.headline: Rakovina's AI-driven ATR Inhibitors enter preclinical testing for cancer treatment, focusing on CNS malignancies.
news.summary: Utilizing generative artificial intelligence (AI) to create tailored treatments for DNA damage response, particularly for challenging central nervous system cancers. This innovative approach aims to address the specific needs of patients with these malignancies, which traditionally have limited treatment options. By leveraging AI technology, researchers hope to develop more effective and precise therapies for these conditions. This groundbreaking research could potentially improve outcomes for a significant number of individuals affected by central nervous system malignancies.

news.headline: Sportsman’s Warehouse partners with Silencer Central for online suppressor purchases, enabling direct home delivery.
news.summary: This collaboration enables customers to buy and submit the necessary documentation online and receive the suppressor directly at their doorstep. This partnership offers a convenient method for purchasing firearms online, streamlining the process and ensuring a seamless delivery experience for customers.

news.headline: Mark Minevich joins SEALSQ Advisory Board to drive AI and quantum tech; SEALSQ focuses on semiconductors and PKI.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), a Geneva-based company specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology, appointed Mark Minevich to its Advisory Board. This move affirms SEALSQ's dedication to innovating in AI and Quantum Technologies. The company focuses on developing and selling hardware and software products in these sectors to drive advancements. This strategic appointment marks a significant step in SEALSQ's continued pursuit of cutting-edge technologies, signaling a strong commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry.

news.headline: Workhorse Group Inc. (Nasdaq: WKHS) announces 1-for-12.5 reverse stock split on March 17, 2025; stock symbol remains "WKHS".
news.summary: Workhorse Group Inc., a US-based technology company on the forefront of zero-emission commercial vehicles, revealed its plan for a 1-for-12.5 reverse stock split of authorized and outstanding common stock valued at $0.001 per share. Trading under the symbol "WKHS" on Nasdaq, the reverse split-adjusted trading will commence on March 17, 2025. The move aims to consolidate the stock value to boost investor interest and market performance.

news.headline: OSS sets conference call on March 19, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET to disclose Q4 and FY 2024 financials.
news.summary: A conference call has been scheduled for Wednesday, March 19, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Participants are required to join the call at the specified date and time.

news.headline: Critical Metals Corp. releases S-K 1300 report on Tanbreez with 45M metric tons of TREO, including 27% Heavy REEs.
news.summary: The initial mineral resource evaluation reveals a deposit of 45 million metric tons containing 0.4% Total Rare Earth Oxides (TREO), with approximately 27% comprised of Heavy Rare Earth Elements. This deposit is hosted in the world's largest rare earth hard rock deposit currently documented.

news.headline: Journey Medical Corp (NASDAQ: DERM) will be at the 37th Annual ROTH Conference in Dana Point, California on March 16-18, 2025.
news.summary: Journey Medical Corporation, a pharmaceutical company trading under the Nasdaq symbol DERM, is actively engaged in selling and marketing FDA-approved prescription pharmaceutical products for dermatological conditions. The company is set to take part in the 37th Annual ROTH Conference from March 16 to 18, 2025, at Dana Point, California. This conference serves as a significant platform for industry stakeholders to share insights and engage with potential investors. Journey Medical Corporation's participation underscores its commitment to growth and showcasing its offerings to a diverse audience.

news.headline: CPI inflation dips, consumer caution evident. S&P 500 futures rise amid Trump travel slump.
news.summary: In February, the consumer price index is projected to reveal a decrease in the core inflation rate due to consumer hesitancy. The latest data indicates a cooling of the CPI inflation, likely influenced by reduced travel following Trump policies. Additionally, S&P 500 futures have seen an increase in response.

news.headline: Banzai announces $22.3M boost to stockholders' equity in the preliminary 2024 financial results.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy shrank by 3.5% in 2020 due to the impact of the Covid-19 pandemic. This marks the worst economic performance since World War II. The report indicates that global trade plummeted by 8.5% in the same year, with developed economies experiencing a 4.6% contraction and emerging markets a 2.5% decline. The pandemic has resulted in the loss of approximately 114 million jobs worldwide, pushing millions into poverty. The IMF projects a global economic growth of 5.5% in 2021, with advanced economies expected to grow by 4.3% and emerging markets by 6.3%. However, the recovery remains uneven and vulnerable to uncertainties surrounding the vaccine rollout and economic policies implemented by governments.

news.headline: US CPI YoY Actual 2.8% (Forecast 2.9%, Previous 3.0%)
US Core CPI YoY Actual 3.1% (Forecast 3.2%, Previous 3.3%)
US Core CPI MoM Actual 0.2% (Forecast 0.3%, Previous 0.4%)
US CPI MoM Actual 0.2% (Forecast 0.3%, Previous 0.5%)
Pondurance® wins three awards in cybersecurity, including MDR service, healthcare solution, and virtual CISO.
news.summary: In Washington, Pondurance, a top provider of managed detection and response (MDR) cybersecurity services tailored for midmarket organizations to minimize breach risks, has recently been recognized by the Cybersecurity Excellence Awards. They secured victories in the MDR service, healthcare cybersecurity solution, and virtual chief information security officer (CISO) categories. This accolade comes at a crucial time as midmarket entities face challenges in safeguarding against cyber threats. Pondurance's expertise in this area has positioned them as a standout choice, showcasing their dedication to enhancing cybersecurity measures for businesses.
